narrative_scene_description: The commercial street begins with KMS TRADERS [entity_004], which operates as an Indian Drugs Merchant [entity_005] and displays the sign FOR ALL YOUR NEEDS [entity_001]. To the right of KMS TRADERS [entity_004] is the fruit shop B.N.FRUITS [entity_006], located at Big Bazaar, Malamuri, Palakkad [entity_007]. Beside B.N.FRUITS [entity_006] is an old building with a tiled roof where a pedestrian wearing a hat is seen walking. Adjacent to this building is YM SNACKS [entity_009]. To the right of the snack shop is A.C. VASUDEVAN SON COIR MERCHANT [entity_013], which features signs for BMS [entity_011] and ANANDA FINEST STONE [entity_012]. Adjacent to the coir merchant is a narrow alleyway where two scooters are parked. To the right of the alleyway is UMA GOLD [entity_021], marked by a Portrait of a woman smiling [entity_020] and signs for GOLD COVERING & LADIES FA [entity_022], OLD JEWELLERY [entity_023], and LADIES [entity_024]. Beside UMA GOLD [entity_021] is UMA GIFT HOUSE, which stands next to a sweet shop where a woman in a saree is walking and a man is sitting. Adjacent to the sweet shop is a cosmetic store featuring an Advertisement showing a plate of fried snacks [entity_025] and an Advertisement showing a slice of cake [entity_026]. To the right of the cosmetic store is P.M. FLOWERS, where one man in a red shirt is standing. Beside P.M. FLOWERS stands the Nayankan Temple, adorned with a Golden statue of a deity on the left [entity_035], another on the right [entity_036], and a large, ornate wooden double door [entity_037]. Adjacent to the temple is a long dark corrugated metal fence where two auto-rickshaws are parked. To the right of this fence is the shop RUBI REXINE [entity_042], advertising INDUSTRIAL FABRIC & FURNISHING FABRIC [entity_043]. Beside RUBI REXINE [entity_042] is THILAKAM PHARMACY CHEMISTS & DRUGGISTS [entity_046], where a man in a green shirt is seen entering. Adjacent to the pharmacy is CN BANANA MERCHANT, which is followed by Das TEA SHOP [entity_050] in MELAMURI [entity_051]. To the right of the tea shop is ANAND FLOUR MILLS [entity_056], displaying the GSTIN: 32FOPW777H1ZL [entity_054] and CELL: 914269 [entity_055]. Beside the flour mill is INDRAN, followed by a yellow building with a 'Shop for Rent' sign. Adjacent to the yellow building is a pink building with a spiral staircase, beside which a white scooter is parked. To the right of the pink building is a general store and a grain shop. Finally, beside the grain shop is SKM COCONUT POINT, which stands next to the Sri Mookambika Lottery Agency and displays a sign for STATIONERY, TISSUE, SCHOOL ITEMS, COSMETICS [entity_061].
temporal_progression_description: At the beginning of the clip (0:00 - 0:10), the vehicle passes KMS TRADERS [entity_004] and B.N.FRUITS [entity_006]. Shortly after (0:11 - 0:25), it travels past A.C. VASUDEVAN SON COIR MERCHANT [entity_013], UMA GOLD [entity_021], and P.M. FLOWERS. As the vehicle continues forward (0:26 - 0:30), it reaches the entrance of the Nayankan Temple complex. Further along the road (0:31 - 0:36), it passes a dark metal fence where auto-rickshaws are parked. Near the end of the clip (0:37 - 1:00), the vehicle passes RUBI REXINE [entity_042], THILAKAM PHARMACY CHEMISTS & DRUGGISTS [entity_046], Das TEA SHOP [entity_050], and ANAND FLOUR MILLS [entity_056], eventually reaching SKM COCONUT POINT.
